title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.815 - Rulemaking authority
text:
190.815.  Rulemaking authority. — The director of the department of social services shall prescribe by rule the form and content of any document required to be filed under sections 190.800 to 190.836.
(L. 2009 S.B. 307, A.L. 2022 S.B. 725) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 190.839
